tagline: Runs compliant outreach and negotiates plans — a manager signs legal escalation and settlements.
problem: Collections is high-volume, script-driven outreach gated by FDCPA / Reg F / TCPA — where one mistimed automated contact is a class-action vector.
outcome: Accounts are segmented and worked with compliant, logged outreach and self-serve payment plans; only legal escalation, settlements and disputed debts reach a manager, who signs.

steps.does: Segment delinquent accounts and pull balances and credit data
Run compliant omnichannel outreach within Reg F / TCPA limits
Validate disputes, check FDCPA / FCRA rules, and propose a plan or settlement
A collections manager / attorney signs legal escalation, settlement, or disputed-debt validation
Execute the approved settlement / payment plan and post the payment
Report to bureaus accurately and log every contact for defense
